_comment: Manual baseline produced by worker-27 (claude-sonnet-4-6) on 2026-04-23. run_loop.py unavailable. Each predicted_trigger determined by reasoning about the arc-audit description: 'Pipeline health audit', 'comprehensive health check across 10+ dimensions', 'audit the pipeline', 'check for issues', 'something feels off', 'run a health check'. More thorough than arc-status; use arc-status for quick read-only overview.

results.query: Audit the product pipeline
results.notes: Exact 'audit' verb matches description trigger phrase.

results.query: Something feels off in the backlog
results.notes: Near-literal match to 'something feels off' trigger phrase in description.

results.query: Check for issues before release
results.notes: 'Check for issues' matches description's pre-milestone health check trigger.

results.query: Something's off with the backlog — find what
results.notes: Diagnostic concern language routes to audit over status.

results.query: Run the health check across our product artifacts
results.notes: 'Health check' is explicit description language.

results.query: Look for stale ideas and broken roadmap refs
results.notes: Named audit dimensions (stale ideas, broken refs) without 'audit' word.

results.query: Do a pre-milestone sweep across BACKLOG and ROADMAP
results.notes: Pre-milestone comprehensive check is described as audit trigger.

results.query: Find stale captured ideas and priority imbalance in the backlog
results.notes: Two named audit dimensions match description's '10+ dimensions'.

results.query: Run cross-reference integrity checks across product artifacts
results.notes: 'Cross-reference integrity' is in the description's dimension list.

results.query: I want a diagnostic report with recommended fixes for the pipeline
results.notes: 'Diagnostic report + interactive fixes' is the exact audit output in description.

results.query: Quick status check
results.notes: Read-only quick pulse routes to arc-status. Description: 'use /arc-status for quick read-only overview'.

results.query: Audit engineering gates
results.notes: Engineering gates routes to Temper's engineering audit, not arc product audit.

results.query: Show me a 30-second project overview
results.notes: Quick read-only overview routes to arc-status.

results.query: What's the status of the current wave?
results.notes: Read-only wave state routes to arc-status.

results.query: Capture this issue — backlog items don't match ROADMAP
results.notes: Explicit 'capture' verb routes to arc-capture despite audit-like content.

results.query: Shape the 'audit dashboard' idea into a brief
results.notes: Refinement routes to arc-shape despite 'audit' word in idea title.

results.query: Plan the next wave with these shaped ideas
results.notes: Forward planning routes to arc-wave.

results.query: Sync the README with the latest audit findings
results.notes: README management routes to arc-sync post-audit.

results.query: Run security audit on the authentication code
results.notes: Security/code audit, out-of-domain for arc product audit.

results.query: Audit our AWS cost allocation for last quarter
results.notes: Finance audit, out-of-domain.
